name: io.github.brightwayai/video-analyzer
description: Analyze videos and generate storyboard breakdowns. Extract frames via scene detection, transcribe audio with Whisper, analyze visuals with Claude Vision, and compute 8-field stylistic fingerprints.

tools.name: video_analyze
tools.description: Run full video analysis pipeline: download, extract frames, transcribe, visual analysis, fingerprint, storyboard output

tools.name: video_extract_frames
tools.description: Extract representative frames using scene detection or fixed intervals

tools.name: video_transcribe
tools.description: Transcribe video audio with OpenAI Whisper

tools.name: video_check_deps
tools.description: Verify all required dependencies are installed
